prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次分别为约 6180→5967→7376→8140→6632，整体呈波动后移趋势；2025 年基准位次约 6632 名，较 2024 年明显回升约 1508 名，显示当年报考热度有所回暖；该校在重庆物理类招生计划 2021 年 104 人、2022 年 97 人、2023 年 97 人、2024 年 98 人、2025 年 92 人；2026 年计划 89 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招约 3.3%，缩招通常使竞争略有加剧，位次数字趋于减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南大学为 985、211、双一流高校；软科主榜 2026 年排名第 27 位（2021–2023 年第 23 位、2024 年第 25 位、2025 年第 27 位），近年排名略有波动但稳居全国前 30，属于顶尖综合性大学；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，原校长被查事件引发学术声誉关注；2025 年声誉亦偏负面（录取断档信号）；抖音热度排名第 85（评价「一般」），短视频曝光量中等偏低，未出现明显报考热潮信号；拥有 13 个 A- 及以上学科：冶金工程 A+、护理学 A+、材料科学与工程 A、临床医学 A-、交通运输工程 A-、土木工程 A-、计算机科学与技术 A-、机械工程 A-、控制科学与工程 A-、化学工程与技术 A-、基础医学 A-、管理科学与工程 A-、马克思主义理论 A-；医学、材料、计算机等强势学科对物理类考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度偏热至高热，临床医学、口腔医学持续推荐，土木建筑明显劝退；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20.9 万（2025 年物理类约 13.95 万、历史类约 7.34 万），总考生规模较 2025 年略有下降，但分科比例需按近年均值估算，物理类考生占比约 65%，竞争环境总体稳定，2025 年物理类本科批 425 分，近年波动不大；中南大学位于湖南长沙，与重庆同属中西部地区，地域偏好无明显偏向；该校在重庆招生占比约 2.3%–2.5%（2025 年总招生约 92 人），属正常跨省招生规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026 年计划小幅缩招、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，在 2025 年基准 6632 名基础上预计位次数字略有减小（竞争略缓）；预测最低位次约 6532 名，区间 6032–7032 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 6032–7032 名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档顶尖专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<6032 名）可重点冲刺临床医学八年制、口腔医学、计算机拔尖班等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（>7032 名）建议以三档优势学科专业为主，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6180→5967→7376→8140→6632, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend; the 2025 baseline ranking is about 6632, a significant rebound of about 1508 from 2024, indicating a recovery in application popularity that year; the university's enrollment plan in Chongqing for Physics Category was 104 in 2021, 97 in 2022, 97 in 2023, 98 in 2024, and 92 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 89, a slight reduction of about 3.3% from 2025, which typically intensifies competition slightly, leading to a smaller ranking number (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Central South University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (23rd in 2021–2023, 25th in 2024, 27th in 2025), with slight fluctuations in recent years but firmly in the top 30 nationally, belonging to top-tier comprehensive universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, with the former president's investigation raising concerns about academic reputation; the 2025 reputation is also somewhat negative (signals of enrollment gaps); Douyin popularity ranking is 85th (rated 'average'), with medium-low short video exposure, no clear signal of an application boom; has 13 disciplines rated A- or above: Metallurgical Engineering A+, Nursing A+, Materials Science and Engineering A, Clinical Medicine A-, Transportation Engineering A-, Civil Engineering A-, Computer Science and Technology A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Basic Medicine A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, Marxist Theory A-; strong disciplines such as medicine, materials, and computer science are highly attractive to Physics Category applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are hot to very hot in social popularity; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology are consistently recommended; Civil Engineering and Architecture are clearly discouraged; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is about 209,000 (in 2025, Physics Category about 139,500, History Category about 73,400), with a slight decrease in total candidates compared to 2025, but the subject ratio needs to be estimated based on recent averages, with Physics Category candidates accounting for about 65%, the competitive environment is generally stable; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch line is 425 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, in the same central-western region as Chongqing, with no obvious regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.3%–2.5% (total enrollment about 92 in 2025), which is a normal cross-province enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the somewhat negative university reputation, and average Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 6632, the ranking number is expected to decrease slightly (competition eases somewhat); the predicted minimum ranking is about 6532, with a range of 6032–7032.

- Computer Science Category.

- Engineering Pilot Class (Rail Transit Infrastructure and Safety Category).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6032–7032, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 top majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<6032), you can focus on aiming for top-tier majors such as Clinical Medicine Eight-Year Program, Stomatology, and Computer Science Top Talent Class; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (>7032), it is recommended to primarily choose Tier 3 advantageous discipline majors, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年历史类最低位次分别为约 918→962→1191→1339→1511，连续 5 年持续后移，累计后移约 593 名；2025 年基准约 1511 名，近 3 年每年后移约 120–170 名，呈稳定下行趋势；该校在重庆历史类招生计划 2021–2024 年均为 17 人，2025 年增至 25 人；2026 年计划 24 人，较 2025 年小幅缩招 1 人（约 4%），缩招使位次数字趋于减小（更易进）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜 2026 年第 27 位，近年排名稳定在前 30，学校层次对历史类考生同样具有较强吸引力；2026 年声誉偏负面（原校长被查），2025 年偏负面（录取断档信号），抖音热度排名第 85（评价「一般」），未出现明显报考热潮；马克思主义理论 A- 等学科与历史类招生专业（法学、中国语言文学类、金融学类、外国语言文学类）有一定关联，但中南大学优势学科以工科和医学为主，文史类学科评估等级相对有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学社会热度分化观望、汉语言文学推荐、金融/财经/经济分化观望、外国语言文学一般观望；本省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 20.9 万，历史类考生占比约 35%（近年均值），历史类考生规模略有下降，竞争压力略有缓解，2025 年历史类本科批 438 分，近年波动不大；中南大学位于湖南长沙，与重庆同属中西部地区，地域偏好无明显偏向；该校在重庆历史类招生占比较小（约 24–25 人），属正常跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅缩招、学校声誉偏负面及抖音热度一般等因素，在 2025 年基准 1511 名基础上预计位次数字略有减小（竞争略缓）；预测最低位次约 1490 名，区间 1266–1714 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 918 → 962 → 1191 → 1339 → 1511, continuously shifting backward for 5 consecutive years, with a cumulative shift of about 593 places; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1511, with an annual backward shift of about 120–170 places in the last 3 years, showing a stable downward trend; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 17 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 25 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 24 students, a slight reduction of 1 student (about 4%) compared to 2025, making the ranking number smaller (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 27th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 30 in recent years, the school level also has strong appeal for History Category candidates; the 2026 reputation is somewhat negative (former president under investigation), 2025 is somewhat negative (admission gap signal), Douyin popularity ranking 85th (rated 'average'), no obvious application boom; Marxist Theory A- and other disciplines have some connection with History Category enrollment majors (Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Finance, Foreign Languages and Literature), but Central South University's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering and medicine, with relatively limited evaluation levels for humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law: social heat diverges, wait-and-see; Chinese Language and Literature: recommended; Finance/Economics/Economy: diverges, wait-and-see; Foreign Languages and Literature: generally wait-and-see; the total number of candidates for the 2026 general college entrance examination in this province is about 209,000, with History Category candidates accounting for about 35% (average in recent years), the scale of History Category candidates has slightly decreased, competition pressure slightly eased, the 2025 History Category undergraduate batch score is 438 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Central South University is located in Changsha, Hunan, both in the central and western regions with Chongqing, with no obvious regional preference; the university's enrollment in History Category in Chongqing is relatively small (about 24–25 students), which is normal cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan, the somewhat negative school reputation, and average Douyin popularity, based on the 2025 baseline of 1511, the ranking number is expected to decrease slightly (competition slightly eases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 1490, with a range of 1266–1714.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1266–1714, with few History Category enrollment majors (only 4), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Chinese Language and Literature and Finance as the main choices, Tier 1 Law as a reach, and Tier 3 Foreign Languages and Literature as a safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<1266), you can focus on reaching for Law and the Experimental Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>1714), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety.
